title: Memorandum Circular No. 134, s. 2007
text:
MEMORANDUM CIRCULAR NO. 134

AUTHORIZING ATTENDANCE TO THE 44 TH FOUNDATION DAY AND ALUMNI CONVENTION AND HOMECOMING OF THE NATIONAL DEFENSE COLLEGE OF THE PHILIPPINES

The National Defense College of the Philippines will celebrate its 44 th Foundation Day Anniversary and Alumni Convention and Homecoming on August 9-10, 2007 at the NDCP Honor Hall.

The NDCP Symposium and Convention will be a good opportunity for the alumni to enhance their expertise in governance and decision-making.

In this connection, alumni of NDCP who are working in the government sector are authorized to attend, on official time, the 44 th Foundation Anniversary and Alumni Convention and Homecoming to be held on August 10, 2007, from 8:00 am to 5:00 pm at the NDCP Honor Hall, and a Symposium to be held on same date from 9:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m.

By authority of the President:

Executive Secretary

Manila, July 2, 2007
